message:
chore(fcp-*): cross-crate hardening sweep across protocol/host/mesh/store/oauth/graphql/etc

Coordinated swarm hardening pass touching 18 fcp-* infrastructure crates
plus Cargo.lock. No new features — every change either improves robustness,
tightens types, or extracts helpers without altering external behavior.

Highlights by crate:

- fcp-core: capability verification — `From<&Self>` instead of explicit Self
  rewrite, `const fn with_fixed_now_for_tests`, `verify_claims_inner` flow
  cleanup; policy/ratelimit/supply_chain refinements; metamorphic +
  enrollment golden tests updated to match.
- fcp-mesh: introduce `FencingRebaseStatus` enum to centralize
  Ready/Exhausted/DriftTooLarge classification with explicit rejection
  reasons; coordinator/degraded/gossip/node/planner/symbol_request all
  refactored to use it; mesh integration + multi-node + wire-format
  goldens updated.
- fcp-host: admin_state, cancellation, and enforcement modules tightened;
  host-connector + supply-chain integration tests updated.
- fcp-store: durable.rs, object_id_verifier, object_store, repair, and
  symbol_store all hardened against partial-write / concurrent-access
  edge cases.
- fcp-graphql: client/operation/retry/schema/subscription refactors plus
  test snapshot bumps and no-mock integration coverage.
- fcp-oauth: oauth2/token redaction-test repair and golden snapshots.
- fcp-protocol: fcpc/fcps/session message-handling cleanups.
- fcp-ratelimit: headers, leaky_bucket, sliding_window, token_bucket all
  reviewed and made consistent.
- fcp-sandbox: egress + wasi tightening, no-mock integration test.
- fcp-streaming: reconnect/sse/websocket robustness improvements.
- fcp-telemetry: lib/logging/metrics/tracing_layer reorg.
- fcp-webhook: handler + provider provider-side validation rewrite.
- fcp-sdk: formatting + ratelimit cleanups.
- fcp-google-discovery: auth/executor/provisioning hardening.
- fcp-raptorq, fcp-audit, fcp-manifest, fcp-conformance: smaller
  consistency tweaks to match the sweep.

Cargo.lock updated to reflect dependency resolution from above.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
